headline: This Biotech Stock Is Stuck in the Red. Its Cancer Portfolio Is About to Change the Narrative.
summary: BioNTech’s  future rests entirely on the success of its pipeline, now that its pandemic-era glory days are firmly in the rearview mirror.  Wall Street is betting the company’s next act in oncology will be worth the wait.  UBS analyst David Dai moved off the sidelines Wednesday as he upgraded  BioNTech  stock to Buy from Neutral with a $135 price target, up from $117.

headline: Healthy Returns: Eli Lilly makes a new push into vaccines – here’s what to know
summary: The drugmaker announced it will buy three privately held vaccine makers in deals worth almost $4 billion combined.
